text: {"procedure_id":"postgrad_admission","stages":[{"ordinal":0,"label":"Programme Mode Selection","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"form","label":"Select programme mode","required":true,"config":{"fields":["mode"],"options":["coursework","research","mixed"]}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":1,"label":"Mode Branch","node_type":"decision","assignee_role":"system","steps":[],"metadata":{"branches":[{"condition_key":"research_mode","criteria":"Student selected research or mixed mode"},{"condition_key":"coursework_mode","criteria":"Student selected coursework"}]}},{"ordinal":2,"label":"Supervisor Outreach","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"form","label":"Identify 1-3 prospective supervisors","required":true,"config":{"fields":["supervisor_1","supervisor_2","supervisor_3"]}},{"ordinal":1,"type":"upload","label":"Upload research proposal (5-10 pages)","required":true,"config":{"accept":["application/pdf"]}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":3,"label":"Document Collection","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"upload","label":"Upload bachelor's transcript","required":true,"config":{"accept":["application/pdf"]}},{"ordinal":1,"type":"upload","label":"Upload bachelor's degree certificate","required":true,"config":{"accept":["application/pdf"]}},{"ordinal":2,"type":"upload","label":"Upload IELTS/TOEFL/MUET (international applicants)","required":false,"config":{}},{"ordinal":3,"type":"form","label":"Statement of purpose","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":4,"label":"Online Application Submission","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Confirm submission via study.um.edu.my","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":5,"label":"Faculty Evaluation (5 working days)","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"ips_officer","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Faculty completeness check","required":true,"config":{"sla_days":5}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":6,"label":"Supervisor Endorsement","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"coordinator","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Prospective supervisor endorses applicant","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":7,"label":"Faculty PG Committee Approval","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"dean","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Committee approves admission","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":8,"label":"IPS Final Approval","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"ips_officer","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"IPS issues offer letter","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":9,"label":"Offered","node_type":"end","assignee_role":null,"steps":[],"metadata":{"outcome":"completed"}}],"edges":[{"source_ordinal":0,"target_ordinal":1,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":1,"target_ordinal":2,"condition_key":"research_mode","label":"Research/Mixed"},{"source_ordinal":1,"target_ordinal":3,"condition_key":"coursework_mode","label":"Coursework"},{"source_ordinal":2,"target_ordinal":3,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":3,"target_ordinal":4,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":4,"target_ordinal":5,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":5,"target_ordinal":6,"condition_key":"approved","label":"Complete"},{"source_ordinal":6,"target_ordinal":7,"condition_key":"approved","label":"Endorsed"},{"source_ordinal":7,"target_ordinal":8,"condition_key":"approved","label":"Approved"},{"source_ordinal":8,"target_ordinal":9,"condition_key":"approved","label":"Offer issued"}],"deadlines":[{"stage_ordinal":5,"label":"Faculty completeness check (5 working days)","iso_date":null,"relative_days":5}],"reasoning":"UM IPS standard postgraduate admission flow. Research/mixed-mode applicants require pre-application supervisor outreach (UM Supervision Policy); coursework applicants skip directly to document collection. Faculty 5-working-day completeness check is per AASD published SLA."}
